About

Data-driven. Narrative-led.

I'm a Marketing Manager based in Singapore with 7+ years of experience building and scaling marketing functions for technology companies across US, APAC and other Global Markets.

My edge is sitting at the intersection of data and storytelling — I don't just run campaigns, I build systems that generate predictable, scalable growth. At ATTIX APAC I've contributed to $54M+ in campaign-attributed commercial outcomes across four brands (2024–2025). At OTSAW Digital I led a NASDAQ-readiness marketing programme delivering 200% brand visibility growth across five international exhibitions on four continents.

I hold an MBA with Distinction from the University of Roehampton and a BSc in Business Management from the University of Birmingham. Bilingual in English and Mandarin — a genuine edge across Singapore and the broader SEA market.

Feb 2024 – Present2+ years
Marketing Manager – Performance & Native Ads
ATTIX APAC · Singapore & United States

Architected full-funnel omni-channel campaigns across Google Ads, Meta, and TikTok — driving $54M+ in campaign-attributed commercial outcomes across 4 brands (AI-driven software company operating across FinTech, Algorithmic Trading, Automotive, and Consumer Technology) through disciplined dual-funnel architecture.

Brands Managed

TradeAlgo — NY FinTech platform. Led 6-channel GTM launch of TradeGPT (Feb 2024) — the "ChatGPT for Money Makers." Google Ads personally managed. $19.8M subscription revenue + $19.5M Reg-D capital raised (2024–2025).

BuyAlerts / PilotAI — Trading education & alerts platform. Reg-D investment capital grew 9× across 2024–2025. Introduced Rumble as new ad channel (March 2025).

Vama Chat & Pay — Multilingual AI Chat & Pay platform. USD 1.51M ad spend → USD 10.1M total capital raised = 7.4× ROAS. 46,000+ investor leads generated.

Vittori Hypercar — 50-unit luxury hypercar, Pininfarina partnership. 15,533 UHNWI leads at ~USD 18.6 CPL. TikTok achieved USD 9.40 CPL — best-performing channel.

Team Structure

Google Ads personally managed by Cayden. Facebook/Meta and TikTok Ads managed by a team reporting directly to Cayden.

SGD 2MIMDA Grant

Developed FY24 Marketing Plan from scratch — hit all 4 KPI targets: LinkedIn 612 leads (target 600) • Google 463 leads (target 450) • Social reach 312K (target 300K) • Email DB 1,824 (target 1,800).

Led 5 international exhibitions end-to-end: ArabHealth Dubai • GSX Dallas USA • UK Healthcare Estates Manchester • K-Hospital South Korea • ASHE USA — 183+ enterprise leads, 3+ new distribution partnerships.

Built HubSpot CRM from zero — 4-stage pipeline (Prospect → MQL → Opportunity → Closed) with 6 sub-stages and automated workflows at every transition. Pipeline accelerated ~35%.

Launched T.GO Express brand — world's first robotics-served bubble tea & courier store. 10,000+ shipments, 220+ five-star Google reviews, 2 locations.

CEO recognised as NASDAQ Entrepreneur of the Year 2022. Deputy Prime Minister Heng Swee Keat attended Company's HQ Grand Opening as Guest of Honour.

References

Trusted by leaders across vouch firsthand.

Two direct line managers — Commercial Director at OTSAW Group and Director of Marketing Communications at ATTIX APAC — share their firsthand account, on company letterhead.

“

Cayden demonstrated the rare ability to think commercially, not just creatively. During a period when we were preparing for a NASDAQ listing and operating under tight, non-negotiable timelines, he consistently delivered work that supported both revenue goals and investor expectations.

Kee Wen Dee
Commercial Director
OTSAW Group · Singapore, USA, Germany
Letter of Recommendation — Kee Wen Dee, Commercial Director, OTSAW Group

I am writing with genuine enthusiasm to recommend Cayden Ng Tze Seng for any future marketing leadership role he is pursuing. I had the pleasure of working closely with Cayden at OTSAW Group, where I served as Commercial Director and directly managed him in his capacity as Assistant Marketing Manager from May 2021 to February 2024.

From day one, Cayden demonstrated the rare ability to think commercially, not just creatively. During a period when we were preparing for a NASDAQ listing and operating under tight, non-negotiable timelines, he consistently delivered work that supported both revenue goals and investor expectations.

In the time he worked with me, Cayden built our annual marketing plan, set clear KPI targets, and met or exceeded them: LinkedIn and Google lead generation both outperformed plan, email database growth was ahead of target, and our social channels regularly achieved over 300,000 monthly impressions across paid and organic activity. Website traffic also grew from 18,000 to more than 160,000 monthly visits, with a significant uplift in overall brand visibility. Cayden also led the company’s international exhibitions, managing five major events across four continents, including ArabHealth (Dubai), Global Security Exchange (Dallas), UK Healthcare Estates (Manchester), K-Hospital (South Korea), and ASHE (United States). He handled end-to-end planning and execution, from booth design and logistics to live robot demonstrations, lead capture, and post-event follow-up.

In addition, he implemented our HubSpot CRM from the ground up, introducing a structured multi-stage pipeline, task automation, and re-engagement workflows. This gave our sales team much better visibility and helped to shorten our lead-to-close cycle.

Cayden has been one of our most impactful hires during a critical phase for the company. I am confident that any organisation hiring him into a mid-level marketing role will benefit from his work ethic, commercial instincts, and ability to execute in an international environment.

“

What stood out was his ability to work across different products and industries while remaining organised and performance-focused. He understood how to adapt campaign direction and messaging based on the needs of each brand — whether the audience was retail traders, investors, consumers, or luxury automotive prospects.

Andrew Yang
Director, Marketing Communications
ATTIX APAC Pte. Ltd. · Singapore
Letter of Recommendation — Andrew Yang, Director of Marketing Communications, ATTIX APAC Pte. Ltd.

I am Andrew, Director of Marketing Communications at ATTIX APAC, an AI-driven software company operating across FinTech, algorithmic trading, automotive, and consumer technology. I had the opportunity to work closely with Cayden Ng Tze Seng for over two years, and I am pleased to recommend him for any role in digital marketing and performance growth.

Cayden played an important role in supporting our digital advertising efforts across multiple brands, including TradeAlgo, BuyAlerts, Vama, and Vittori. He was responsible for managing Google Ads campaigns, supporting audience targeting, campaign optimisation, and performance tracking across different markets and customer segments.

What stood out about Cayden was his ability to work across different products and industries while remaining organised and performance-focused. He understood how to adapt campaign direction and messaging based on the needs of each brand, whether the audience was retail traders, investors, consumers, or luxury automotive prospects.

He also contributed to reporting and campaign analysis, helping the team track key metrics and identify opportunities to improve results. Cayden was dependable, responsive, and willing to take ownership of his work. He worked well with both internal stakeholders and the wider marketing team, and he carried himself with professionalism throughout.

Cayden is a capable and thoughtful marketer with solid hands-on experience in paid media, campaign strategy, and digital growth. I believe he will be a valuable addition to any organisation seeking someone with practical marketing experience and a strong work ethic.

I am happy to recommend him and believe he has the potential to continue growing into a strong marketing professional.
